pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh output, and export_result.sh logic

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to whitelist the target IP '172.16.0.50' with the description 'Authorized_Nessus_Scanner', and save these details to the verification file '/home/ga/whitelist_config.txt'. These parameters are predefined constants in the task instructions and evaluation scripts.
